creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Thank you for your support of FreeBSD and the ports collection. We do appreciate your offer to step up and become a ports  
maintainer. 
If you have not yet, please make sure you read the port maintainers handbook: 
<http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/> 
Keep in mind that you can always ask questions on the ports@FreeBSD mailing list. 

Specifically: please run portlint -N and fix the errors before resubmitting shar. 
When you resubmit the shar, I will take a look at it again. 
style IS important. (no blank lines in pkg-plist please, use tabs not spaces in Makefile, use ${}, not $() in Makefile when it  
is called for) 
Also, the distinfo is incorrect. 
hint:https://github.com/downloads/grantma/racoon-tool/racoon-tool_0.1.tar.gz 
Again please subscribe to port@ mailing list and thank you again for your submittion.
